sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62717" key="leukopte/ruc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-πτέρυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., prob. l. in Ion Eleg. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg011.perseus-grc1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
